prompt: An abstract collage of floral arrangements and musical notes, intertwined in vivid watercolors against a soft pastel backdrop.
prompt_refined: An abstract art collage featuring delicate floral arrangements and intricate musical notes, including staves and individual notes. These elements are fluidly intertwined and overlap, forming a cohesive visual tapestry. The entire composition is rendered in a vibrant watercolor style, showcasing transparent washes, soft blending, and spontaneous brushstrokes. A gentle, diffused pastel backdrop provides a harmonious setting for the artwork.
